name: Overly Restrictive Regular Expression
description: A regular expression is overly restrictive, which prevents dangerous values from being detected. This can cause security-relevant inputs to bypass validation when the regex fails to match all intended malicious patterns.
detection_pattern: Look for INGRESS nodes where user input passes through a CONTROL node (regex validation/filter) that is too narrow in its matching pattern, allowing dangerous values to reach TRANSFORM or STORAGE nodes unfiltered. The mediator (regex check) exists but is insufficient.
graph_query: INGRESS→TRANSFORM|STORAGE where CONTROL(regex) is present but incomplete
